<a id="class-marker3d"></a>

# Marker3D

**Inherits:** [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Generic 3D position hint for editing.

## Description

Generic 3D position hint for editing. It's just like a plain [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d), but it displays as a cross in the 3D editor at all times.

## Properties

| [float](class_float.md#class-float)   | [gizmo_extents](#class-marker3d-property-gizmo-extents)   | `0.25`   |
|---------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|----------|

---
